calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gabriel Argenis Vera Mora Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per is present with the assistance of Spanish Interpreter Enrique Hernandez who has an oath on file.

Carlos Casamass Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per

All parties are sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent Gabriel Vera testifies on his own behalf with the assistance of Spanish Interpreter Mr. Hernandez.

Carlos Casamass Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.

The Court asks clarifying questions.

Plaintiff/Respondent Gabriel Vera testifies further on his own behalf with the assistance of Spanish Interpreter Mr. Hernandez.

Carlos Casamass Defendant/Appellant testifies further on his own behalf.
Mr. Casamass presents the following exhibits:
Exh. 1: a generic lease to own contract generally used in his business.
Exh. 2: Invoice signed by Plaintiff/Respondent

The Court retains the Exh. 2 for review.
The Court takes this matter under submission and will issue a decision via USPS mail.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
